forbidden.title: You don't have access to this page
forbidden.description: Your account doesn't have permission to view this content. If you think this is a mistake, talk to one of your workspace's admins.

notFound.title: This page doesn't exist
notFound.description: The address may have changed or never existed at all. In the meantime, how about jumping some obstacles?

offline.title: You're offline
offline.description: We can't reach agencios right now. As soon as your internet is back, the page will recover on its own — or jump some obstacles while you wait.

serverError.description: We've been notified and we're on it. Try reloading the page — or take the frustration out on the game below.

dino.start: Press space or tap to start
dino.retry: Press space or tap to try again
dino.hint: Space, ↑ or tap the game to jump the obstacles
